# Sixty Newton — llms.txt
# Guidance for LLM crawlers indexing https://sixtynewton.com

Site: Sixty Newton — Technical Services
Description: A single-source fit-out contractor in the UAE for mechanical, electrical, plumbing,
swimming pool, joinery and specialist finishings (epoxy, microcement, screed, waterproofing, tiling,
paint, vinyl). Operating across Sharjah and the wider UAE.

Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/

Sitemap: https://sixtynewton.com/sitemap.xml

# Primary services
- MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing)
- Swimming Pools & Specialist Water Systems
- Fit-Out (General Contracting)
- Epoxy Flooring
- Vinyl Flooring
- Screed & Self-Levelling
- Waterproofing
- Tiling
- Microcement
- Paint (Interior & Exterior)
- General Maintenance

# Contact
Email: hello@sixtynewton.com
Location: Sharjah, United Arab Emirates
